Current Addiction Research (CRR) is a peer-reviewed, open access journal that publishes high quality research in all areas of addiction and related disorders without any publication fee. All editorial costs are covered by Üsküdar University Press.

The journal accepts and publishes original research, short studies, case reports, reviews and letters to the editor on alcohol, drug and nicotine addictions, behavioral addictions such as gambling and internet. The journal evaluates studies on the disease and concept of addiction in the fields of psychology, sociology, psychiatry, epidemiology, social policy, medicine, pharmacology and neuroscience.
